title: Lead Investment Banker at Care Ratings

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Care Ratings
jsonLd.description:
Care Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Ratings:
Care Ratings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings!
